name: loopforge
description: Security agent loops where the verify gate is executable, not prose. A loop closes only when its verifier exits 0.

loops.title: Threat-model loop
loops.summary: Build a structured, internally consistent threat model before scanning a system.
loops.use_when: Starting on a new or unfamiliar codebase, before vuln scanning or triage.

loops.title: Patch loop
loops.summary: Prove a candidate fix by executing: reproduce PoC, apply patch, confirm PoC dead, tests green.
loops.use_when: You have a confirmed vulnerability and a candidate patch to land.
loops.verifier_runtime: python3.8+; git or patch on PATH
